description: My Business Notifications API is part of Google Business Profile APIs. It lets business account integrations manage Pub/Sub notification settings for receiving real-time business profile events.
summary: One HTTP REST API surface: the My Business Notifications API at `https://mybusinessnotifications.googleapis.com/v1`, documented by Google and described by an OpenAPI document mirrored by APIs.guru; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface found for this domain.
